Footer.tagline: AI-powered CRM and WhatsApp Business automation for e-commerce

Meta.title: MORFX S.A.S. — AI-powered CRM and WhatsApp Business automation
Meta.description: Colombian SaaS platform for CRM and AI-powered WhatsApp Business automation for e-commerce. Conversational agents, Shopify and carrier integrations, and multi-channel customer care.

Hero.headline: AI-powered CRM and WhatsApp Business automation
Hero.subhead: We unify CRM, conversational customer care and automations on a single platform so e-commerce companies can sell, respond and fulfill with greater precision and lower operating cost.
Hero.responseTag: Reply within minutes via WhatsApp · Monday to Friday, 8:00 to 18:00 (Colombia time)

About.heading: A Colombian company building AI platforms for business
About.intro: MORFX S.A.S. is a simplified joint-stock company incorporated in Colombia in 2026, headquartered in Bucaramanga, Santander. We develop, operate and license the MORFX platform — an ecosystem of CRM, conversational agents and automations designed for e-commerce companies and other productive sectors that require customer care at scale and integrated logistics management.
About.objetoSocial: Development, design, implementation, operation, commercialization and licensing of technology platforms based on artificial intelligence, with special emphasis on customer service, logistics management and commercial processes for e-commerce companies and other productive sectors.
About.objetoSocialSource: Incorporation deed under Colombian Law 1258 of 2008.

CRM.heading: Unified CRM for e-commerce
CRM.description: We consolidate contacts, conversations, orders and sales stages in a single view. Every interaction is attached to the right customer, with complete history and synchronized status across WhatsApp, orders and pipelines.
CRM.bullet1: Unified contact profiles with full message and order history
CRM.bullet2: Configurable pipelines per business line, with custom stages
CRM.bullet3: Tags, notes and tasks synchronized between CRM and WhatsApp inbox
CRM.bullet4: Side-by-side conversation view with contact and order context

Agents.heading: AI conversational agents
Agents.description: Our customer-care and sales agents run on leading language models (Anthropic Claude and OpenAI GPT) and are instrumented to deliver human-like conversational performance, with traceability, guardrails and tone fully controlled by each customer.
Agents.bullet1: 24/7 customer care and sales with tone configurable per brand
Agents.bullet2: Spanish-first comprehension with intent- and context-based routing
Agents.bullet3: Per-turn observability: events, queries and AI calls are auditable
Agents.bullet4: Escalation to a human whenever the customer asks or ambiguity is detected

Automations.heading: No-code intelligent automations
Automations.description: A visual builder with an AI assistant lets you design business flows that react to events from your store, your CRM or WhatsApp. We connect 10 trigger types with 11 actions across contacts, orders, stages, messages and notifications.
Automations.bullet1: 10 triggers: new orders, stage changes, incoming messages and more
Automations.bullet2: 11 actions: send a message, move stage, assign tag, create task and more
Automations.bullet3: Visual builder with an AI assistant that explains and validates each flow
Automations.bullet4: Conditions and delays by business hours, working days and customer segment

Integrations.heading: Integrations with your e-commerce stack
Integrations.description: MORFX connects with the platforms Colombian companies already use: Shopify stores, local carriers and payment gateways. The goal is for orders, shipping guides and payments to flow without intermediate spreadsheets or copying data between systems.
Integrations.bullet1: Shopify: orders, products and customers synced in real time
Integrations.bullet2: Coordinadora and Inter Rapidísimo: shipping-guide creation and tracking
Integrations.bullet3: Configurable webhooks to connect the customer's own internal systems
Integrations.bullet4: Internal API for agent actions with workspace-level validation

Multichannel.heading: Multi-channel, starting with WhatsApp Business Platform
Multichannel.description: Today we operate on WhatsApp Business Platform, the highest-volume channel in Colombia. We are enabling Messenger and Instagram Direct through direct Meta integration so a single conversation, CRM and agent can serve every channel the customer uses.
Multichannel.bullet1: WhatsApp Business Platform with templates, sessions and campaigns
Multichannel.bullet2: Coming soon: Facebook Messenger and Instagram Direct (Meta Direct)
Multichannel.bullet3: One thread per contact, regardless of the originating channel
Multichannel.bullet4: Auditable log of every inbound and outbound message per channel

CTA.heading: Ready to get started?
CTA.description: Let's talk about your operation, show you the platform live and propose an implementation plan aligned with your sales and logistics processes.
CTA.contactLine: You can also call us at {phone} or write to {email}.

Manifest.headline:
One system to sell, reply and deliver.

Not five tools held together with tape.

Terms.preamble: Welcome to MORFX. Before accessing or using the Platform and Services of MORFX S.A.S. (hereinafter “MORFX”, “we” or the “Company”), please read carefully these Terms of Service (hereinafter the “Terms”). Accessing, registering or using the Platform implies full, free and informed acceptance of these Terms and of the documents incorporated by reference. If you do not agree with any of these conditions, you must refrain from using the Platform.

section1.heading: 1. Identification of the Website and Platform Owner
paragraphs: This website and the Platform are operated by:
bullets: Legal name: MORFX S.A.S.
Principal domicile: Bucaramanga, Colombia
Contact email: morfx.colombia@gmail.com

subsections.heading: Legal nature
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. is a simplified joint-stock company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Colombia, whose main activity consists of providing AI-powered conversational agent technology services aimed at automating logistics and customer service for e-commerce operations.

section2.heading: 2. Definitions
paragraphs: For purposes of these Terms, the following capitalized terms shall have the meaning indicated below:

subsections.heading: Services Agreement
paragraphs: The specific contract executed between MORFX S.A.S. and the Client Company that governs the particular conditions of the provision of the Services, incorporated into these Terms by reference.

subsections.heading: Conversational Agent
paragraphs: The Platform's artificial intelligence component that interacts in an automated manner with the Client Company's end consumers through Communication Channels, processing natural language to resolve inquiries, manage orders and automate logistics processes.

subsections.heading: Communication Channel
paragraphs: The medium agreed between the Client Company and MORFX S.A.S. (including the Platform, WhatsApp or other designated channels) for communications related to the execution of the Services.

subsections.heading: Client's End Consumer
paragraphs: A natural or legal person who acquires the Client Company's products or services, and who may interact with MORFX S.A.S.'s Conversational Agent within that commercial relationship.

subsections.heading: AI Credits
paragraphs: Consumption units that quantify the Client Company's use of the Platform's artificial intelligence capabilities, according to the billing model set forth in the Services Agreement and the Fee Schedule.

subsections.heading: Personal Data
paragraphs: Any information linked to or that may be associated with one or more specific or identifiable natural persons, as defined in article 3 of Law 1581 of 2012 (the Colombian Personal Data Protection Law).

subsections.heading: Client Company
paragraphs: The natural or legal person that contracts MORFX S.A.S.'s Services by accepting the Services Agreement and these Terms.

subsections.heading: Data Processor
paragraphs: The natural or legal person that performs the processing of personal data on behalf of the Data Controller, in accordance with article 3 of Law 1581 of 2012.

subsections.heading: Subscription Plan
paragraphs: The modality of access to MORFX S.A.S.'s Services requiring the payment of a recurring fee, according to the Starter, Growth, Business or Enterprise tiers defined in the Fee Schedule.

subsections.heading: Platform
paragraphs: The digital AI conversational agent platform managed and operated by MORFX S.A.S., including its web applications, APIs, integrations and all enabled Communication Channels.

subsections.heading: Data Controller
paragraphs: The natural or legal person that decides on the database and/or the processing of personal data, in accordance with article 3 of Law 1581 of 2012.

subsections.heading: Services
paragraphs: The set of technological functionalities and offerings that MORFX S.A.S. makes available to the Client Company under the Services Agreement, including access to the Conversational Agent, technological infrastructure, integrations, technical support and training.

subsections.heading: SLA (Service Level Agreement)
paragraphs: The set of availability, performance and support metrics that MORFX S.A.S. commits to maintain regarding the Platform, applicable to the Business and Enterprise plans as per the Services Agreement.

subsections.heading: Administrator User
paragraphs: The natural person designated by the Client Company to manage access, configuration and supervision of the Platform on behalf of such company.

section3.heading: 3. Purpose and Nature of the Service
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. provides Client Companies with access to its AI conversational agent Platform, aimed at automating logistics processes, order management and customer service for e-commerce operations, currently available in Colombia and Ecuador.
The Services include, without limitation:
bullets: Access to Conversational Agents with human-like performance, adaptable to the Client Company's sales and logistics protocols.
Advanced technological infrastructure that supports the agents, including natural language processing (NLP), integrations with logistics platforms and customer service channels.
Integrations with e-commerce platforms (e.g., Shopify), logistics operators and messaging channels (e.g., WhatsApp Business Platform).
Technical support and Platform maintenance according to the service levels agreed in the Services Agreement.
Initial training in the use of the Platform.

subsections.heading: Comprehensive legal framework
paragraphs: These Terms, together with the Services Agreement and its Annexes, constitute the complete legal framework governing the relationship between MORFX S.A.S. and the Client Company. In the event of conflict between these documents, the Services Agreement shall prevail with respect to the particular conditions agreed upon.

section4.heading: 4. Geographic Availability and Jurisdictional Limitations
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S.'s Services are available only in Colombia and Ecuador. MORFX S.A.S. does not guarantee the availability, adequacy or regulatory compliance of the Platform outside those jurisdictions. The Client Company acknowledges that it is its sole responsibility to verify the legality of the use of the Services in the jurisdiction where its commercial activities and its End Consumers operate.

In Colombia, the Services are provided with coverage in the cities of Bogotá, Medellín, Cali, Barranquilla and Bucaramanga, and MORFX S.A.S. may expand or modify such coverage upon prior notice to Client Companies.

section5.heading: 5. Registration, Access and Conditions of Use of the Platform

subsections.heading: 5.1 Registration
paragraphs: Access to the Platform requires the prior registration of the Client Company, by providing truthful, complete and up-to-date information. The Client Company is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of its access credentials and for all activities performed under its account. It shall immediately notify MORFX S.A.S. of any unauthorized use of its account.

subsections.heading: 5.2 Permitted Use
paragraphs: The Client Company may use the Platform exclusively to:
bullets: Automate customer service and logistics processes within its e-commerce operations.
Configure and manage Conversational Agents to interact with its End Consumers.
Integrate the Platform with its internal systems and commercial platforms, under the technical terms enabled by the Services Agreement.
Access the reports, analytics and functionalities included in its Subscription Plan.

subsections.heading: 5.3 Prohibited Uses
paragraphs: The Client Company agrees not to use the Platform for:
bullets: Illicit, fraudulent, misleading activities or activities contrary to public order and good morals.
Collecting, storing or processing personal data of End Consumers without having the authorizations required by Law 1581 of 2012 and other applicable regulations.
Transmitting content that infringes third parties' intellectual or industrial property rights.
Introducing viruses, malware or other harmful elements into the Platform.
Performing reverse engineering, decompiling or attempting to access the Platform's source code.
Assigning, sublicensing or transferring access to the Platform to third parties not authorized by MORFX S.A.S.
Using the Platform for purposes other than those contemplated in the Services Agreement.

subsections.heading: 5.4 Consequences of Breach
paragraphs: Breach of the conditions of use shall entitle MORFX S.A.S. to suspend or terminate access to the Platform, without prejudice to the legal actions that may apply.

subsections.heading: 6.1 Hybrid Subscription and AI Credits Model
paragraphs: Access to the Services is governed by a hybrid model that combines a monthly subscription fee (according to the chosen Plan: Starter, Growth, Business or Enterprise) with an AI Credits system that quantifies actual consumption of artificial intelligence functionalities. The current fees, plan details, the AI Credits system and pass-through costs of third-party services are published in the Fee Schedule of the Services Agreement, available for consultation during the contracting process.

subsections.heading: 6.2 Fee Adjustments
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. may adjust the fees of the Services upon a minimum prior notice of thirty (30) calendar days. If the Client Company does not accept the adjustment, it may terminate the Services Agreement without penalty by notifying MORFX S.A.S. before the effective date of the new price.

subsections.heading: 9.1 MORFX S.A.S. Property
paragraphs: The following are the exclusive property of MORFX S.A.S. and shall remain so during and after the term of the Services Agreement:
bullets: The Platform in its entirety, including source code, object code, algorithms, artificial intelligence models, software architecture, application programming interfaces (APIs), technical documentation and any improvement or update.
MORFX S.A.S.'s methods, processes, know-how and trade secrets.

The insights, statistical analyses and aggregated data that MORFX S.A.S. generates from the use of the Platform by multiple Client Companies, provided they do not directly or indirectly identify a specific Client Company or end consumer.
The “MORFX” brand, its variations, logos, designs and other distinctive signs of MORFX S.A.S.

subsections.heading: 9.2 License to Use
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. grants the Client Company a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license, valid for the term of the Services Agreement, to access and use the Platform solely for the purposes set forth in these Terms and the Services Agreement. Nothing in these Terms implies an assignment of intellectual property rights to the Client Company.

subsections.heading: 9.3 Client Company Property
paragraphs: The following are the exclusive property of the Client Company:
bullets: The data and information about its business (products, prices, inventories, policies, service protocols).
The personal data of its End Consumers.
The content, texts, scripts and conversational flows that the Client Company develops or supplies for the configuration of the Agents.

subsections.heading: 9.4 Confidentiality
paragraphs: Each party undertakes to maintain strict confidentiality over the other party's confidential information, including technical, commercial, financial and strategic data, during the term of the Services Agreement and for a period of three (3) years following its termination. This obligation shall survive termination of the Agreement.

section10.heading: 10. Service Levels (SLA)
paragraphs: Service Level Agreements apply only to Client Companies on Business and Enterprise plans. Availability metrics (uptime), Agent response times, error rates and incident resolution times are detailed in the Services Agreement.

The procedure for claiming credits due to SLA breach, the applicable exclusions (force majeure, scheduled maintenance, third-party failures, massive cyber attacks) and the monthly credit limits are governed entirely by the conditions of the Services Agreement.

subsections.heading: 11.1 MORFX S.A.S. Liability Exemptions
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. shall not be liable for:
bullets: Damages arising from inappropriate, negligent or unauthorized use of the Platform by the Client Company, its employees or third parties authorized by it.
Breach of data protection obligations by the Client Company in its capacity as Data Controller.
Events of force majeure or fortuitous cause, including natural disasters, pandemics, acts of authority, or general interruptions of telecommunications or energy services.
Failures or interruptions in third-party infrastructure outside the reasonable control of MORFX S.A.S.
Massive cyber attacks that exceed reasonable mitigation capabilities in the industry.
Commercial, operational or logistics decisions made by the Client Company based on information processed by the Conversational Agent.
Incorrect or outdated content supplied by the Client Company for the configuration of the Agent.

subsections.heading: 11.2 Liability Cap
paragraphs: In no event shall MORFX S.A.S.'s total liability for direct damages exceed the equivalent of the amount billed by MORFX S.A.S. to the Client Company during the six (6) months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim. MORFX S.A.S. shall in no event be liable for indirect damages, lost profits, loss of data, loss of reputation, future consequential damages, or special or consequential damages, even if MORFX S.A.S. was advised of their possibility.

subsections.heading: 11.3 Liability towards End Consumers
paragraphs: The Client Company is responsible before the End Consumer for compliance with the obligations arising from the sale or provision of services, in accordance with Law 1480 of 2011 (the Colombian Consumer Statute) and other applicable regulations, including warranties, deliveries, returns and claims. The use of the Conversational Agent does not transfer to MORFX S.A.S. any responsibility towards the End Consumer as a seller or service provider.

subsections.heading: 12.1 Term
paragraphs: The Services Agreement shall have an initial term of twelve (12) months counted from the date of execution, automatically renewable for equal periods of twelve (12) months, unless either party expresses its will not to renew it with a minimum prior notice of thirty (30) calendar days before the expiration of the corresponding period.

subsections.heading: 12.2 Grounds for Termination
paragraphs: The Services Agreement may terminate for:
bullets: Material breach not remedied within fifteen (15) business days following written notice.
Declaration of insolvency, forced liquidation or cessation of payments by either party.
Mutual agreement in writing between the parties.
Termination for cause: illicit use of the Platform, serious and repeated violation of data protection regulations, payment default exceeding sixty (60) calendar days.
Termination without cause: upon minimum prior notice of sixty (60) calendar days from either party.

subsections.heading: 12.3 Post-Contractual Effects
paragraphs: Upon termination of the Agreement, regardless of the cause:
bullets: The Client Company shall pay all outstanding amounts for services effectively rendered.
MORFX S.A.S. shall securely return or delete the data of the Client Company and its End Consumers within a maximum period of thirty (30) calendar days.
The use of MORFX S.A.S.'s trademarks by the Client Company and vice versa shall immediately cease.
The clauses on confidentiality, intellectual property, limitations of liability and dispute resolution shall survive termination.

section13.heading: 13. Dispute Resolution and Applicable Law
paragraphs: These Terms and the Services Agreement are governed by the laws of the Republic of Colombia. The parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent judges and courts of Bucaramanga, Colombia.

subsections.heading: 14.1 Modification of the Terms
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. may modify these Terms at any time by publishing the updated version on the website indicating the date of the last modification. Continued use of the Platform after publication of the modified Terms shall constitute acceptance thereof. For material changes, MORFX S.A.S. shall notify Client Companies by email with a minimum prior notice of thirty (30) days.

subsections.heading: 14.2 Entirety of the Agreement
paragraphs: These Terms, together with the Services Agreement and its Annexes, constitute the entire agreement between the parties with respect to their subject matter and supersede any prior agreement, negotiation or understanding, whether oral or written.

subsections.heading: 14.3 Severability
paragraphs: If any provision of these Terms is declared invalid, illegal or unenforceable, such provision shall be deemed severable and the remaining provisions shall continue in full effect.

subsections.heading: 14.4 No Waiver
paragraphs: The omission or delay by either party in exercising a right granted by these Terms or by law shall not constitute a waiver of such right.

subsections.heading: 14.5 Assignment
paragraphs: Neither party may assign the rights or obligations arising from the Services Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party, except that MORFX S.A.S. may assign the Agreement to a company of the same business group or to an acquirer of a substantial part of its assets, by notifying the Client Company with fifteen (15) business days' prior notice.

subsections.heading: 14.6 Notices
paragraphs: All notices shall be given in writing and shall be deemed received: (i) on the date of personal delivery with acknowledgement of receipt; (ii) on the following business day if sent by email with confirmation of receipt; or (iii) on the third business day following dispatch by certified mail.

section15.heading: 15. Contact Channels and Customer Service
paragraphs: For inquiries related to these Terms, the Services Agreement, the exercise of rights over personal data, or any complaint or claim, the Client Company or any data subject may contact MORFX S.A.S. through the following channels:
bullets: Email (primary channel): morfx.colombia@gmail.com
Address: Bucaramanga, Colombia

subsections.heading: Response timeframes
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. shall respond to requests within the timeframes established by applicable Colombian regulations according to the nature of each request.

section16.heading: 16. Entry into Force
paragraphs: These Terms of Service enter into force as of the date of their publication on the MORFX S.A.S. website and shall apply to all Services Agreements executed as of that date, as well as to Agreements in force to the extent that they do not contradict particular conditions previously agreed upon.

Privacy.pageTitle: Privacy Policy and Personal Data Processing
Privacy.preamble: MORFX S.A.S. is committed to protecting the personal data of Administrator Users, Client Companies and End Consumers in accordance with Colombian Law 1581 of 2012 (Personal Data Protection Law), Decree 1377 of 2013 and other applicable regulations in force in Colombia. This Privacy Policy and Personal Data Processing Notice is an integral part of the Terms of Service and describes how MORFX S.A.S. collects, uses, stores, transmits and protects personal data within the Platform.

subsections.heading: 7.1 Applicable Legal Framework
paragraphs: The processing of personal data within this website, the Platform and the Services is governed by Law 1581 of 2012 (Personal Data Protection Law), Decree 1377 of 2013 and other applicable regulations in force in Colombia.

subsections.heading: 7.2 Data Processed by MORFX S.A.S. as Data Controller
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S., in its capacity as Data Controller, collects and processes the following personal data of Administrator Users of Client Companies:
bullets: Identification data: full name, identification number, job title.
Contact data: email address, telephone, city of residence.
Commercial data: information about the contracting company, consumption and billing history.
Usage data: access logs, Platform configurations, Service usage metrics.

subsections.heading: Purposes of Processing
paragraphs: The purposes of processing by MORFX S.A.S. are:
bullets: Management of the Services Agreement and the contractual relationship with the Client Company.
Billing, collection and payment management.
Technical support, maintenance and improvement of the Platform.
Sending communications related to the Services, updates and relevant changes.
Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations.
Sending commercial and marketing information about new functionalities or services, subject to prior authorization from the data subject.

subsections.heading: 7.3 MORFX S.A.S. as Data Processor
paragraphs: With respect to the personal data of the End Consumers of the Client Company that are processed through the Platform, MORFX S.A.S. acts in its capacity as Data Processor, following exclusively the instructions of the Client Company, which is the Data Controller with respect to such consumers. MORFX S.A.S. will not determine the purposes of processing of such data and will not use them for its own purposes other than the provision of the Services.

subsections.heading: 7.4 Client Company Obligations as Data Controller
paragraphs: In its capacity as Data Controller of the data of its End Consumers, the Client Company undertakes to:
bullets: Obtain the prior, express and informed consent of its end consumers in accordance with article 9 of Law 1581 of 2012, before the Platform collects their personal data.
Maintain a current and published Personal Data Processing Policy that contemplates the use of the Conversational Agent.
Process and respond in a timely manner to requests for ARCO rights (Access, Rectification, Cancellation and Objection) from its End Consumers within the legal timeframes.
Ensure that the data transmitted to MORFX S.A.S. through the Platform are data over which it has full legal authority to process.

subsections.heading: 7.5 Informed Consent Flow in the Platform
paragraphs: The MORFX S.A.S. Conversational Agent shall implement the following informed consent mechanism in each interaction with an End Consumer:

Before starting the conversation, the Agent may indicate to the End Consumer: (a) the hyperlink where they can consult the Data Controller's (Client Company's) personal data processing policy, which must include the identity of the Controller, purposes of processing, rights of the data subject, and channel to exercise them; and (b) that by continuing the conversation, they authorize the processing of their personal data for the informed purposes.
The Client Company is responsible for keeping evidence of the consent granted by its End Consumers.

subsections.heading: 7.6 Data Transmission to Sub-processors
paragraphs: For the provision of the Services, MORFX S.A.S. may transmit personal data of End Consumers to the following sub-processors:
bullets: Cloud infrastructure providers (servers, storage and compute).
Large language model (LLM) providers used by the Conversational Agents.
Logistics and messaging platforms integrated with the Platform.

subsections.heading: Authorization and updates
paragraphs: By executing the Services Agreement, the Client Company expressly authorizes such transmissions. MORFX S.A.S. guarantees the existence of data processing agreements with sub-processors when the regulation requires it, and will verify their level of data protection. The list of sub-processors will be available for consultation by the Client Company and will be updated with fifteen (15) days' prior notice for relevant changes.

subsections.heading: 7.7 Rights of Data Subjects (ARCO)
paragraphs: Data subjects whose personal data are processed by MORFX S.A.S. in its capacity as Data Controller (Administrator Users) have the following rights, exercisable under the terms of Law 1581 of 2012 (ARCO: Access, Rectification, Cancellation, Objection):
bullets: Access: To know the personal data that MORFX S.A.S. processes about them.
Update and Rectification: To request the correction of inaccurate, incomplete or outdated data.
Deletion: To request the deletion of their data when there is no legal or contractual obligation to keep them.
Revocation of consent: To withdraw the authorization granted for the processing of their data.
Filing complaints with the SIC (Colombian Data Protection Authority) when their rights are infringed.

subsections.heading: Channel and response timeframes
paragraphs: To exercise these rights, data subjects may write to: morfx.colombia@gmail.com. MORFX S.A.S. will respond within the timeframes established by Law 1581 of 2012 (ten (10) business days for access; fifteen (15) business days for other requests, extendable by an additional eight (8) business days with just cause).

subsections.heading: 7.8 Data Retention and Deletion
paragraphs: MORFX S.A.S. will retain the personal data of Administrator Users during the term of the Services Agreement and for the additional period necessary to comply with legal and contractual obligations. Personal data of End Consumers processed as Data Processor will be returned or securely deleted within a maximum period of thirty (30) calendar days after termination of the Agreement, at the Client Company's election.

In the event of a security incident affecting personal data, MORFX S.A.S. shall notify the Client Company within no more than seventy-two (72) hours from knowledge of the fact, and will cooperate with the Client Company to comply with notification duties to the SIC and affected data subjects in accordance with current regulations.

subsections.heading: 8.1 Cookie Consent and Management
paragraphs: When entering the website for the first time, the user may find a notice (cookie banner) that allows them to accept or reject the non-essential cookie categories. The user may at any time manage or revoke their cookie preferences through their browser configuration or the preferences panel available on the website. The revocation of consent for non-essential cookies will not affect the functionality of strictly necessary cookies nor the provision of the contracted Services.

subsections.heading: 8.2 Cookie Data Retention
paragraphs: Where applicable, session cookies are deleted when the browser is closed. Persistent cookies have a maximum duration of twelve (12) months, unless otherwise indicated in the description of each cookie.

sectionContact.heading: Contact Channels
paragraphs: For inquiries related to this Privacy Policy, the exercise of ARCO rights, or any personal data incident, please contact MORFX S.A.S. through the following channels:
bullets: Email: morfx.colombia@gmail.com
Address: Carrera 38 # 42 - 17 Apartamento 1601B, Bucaramanga, Santander, Colombia

sectionEffective.heading: Effective Date
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy enters into force on April 14, 2026 and shall apply to all Users and data subjects as of that date.
